task_name: Add Approval Readiness Review Suite Coverage
goal: Add Approval Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite and document the new local review coverage.
claims: BP-059 adds Approval Readiness Candidate checks to the shared Bluepilot review suite.

BP-059 adds output invariant coverage that keeps approval_effect none, human_approval_recorded false, approval_record_allowed false, builder_task_create_allowed false, and builder_execute_allowed false.
BP-059 does not change Approval Readiness Candidate runtime behavior or fixtures.
assumptions: BP-058 already introduced the local Approval Readiness Candidate mock and golden fixtures.
Review suite coverage should remain the shared entry point for local reviewers.
Invariant tests are needed before expanding toward any auth, persistence, approval record, or Builder adapter handoff.
dod: tools/test-bluepilot-review-suite.cjs runs Approval Readiness Candidate syntax, fixtures, and invariant checks.
docs/BLUEPILOT_REVIEW_SUITE_v0.md mentions Approval Readiness Candidate coverage and limits.
stop_conditions: Approval Readiness Candidate runtime or fixture changes become necessary
Effective approval, auth, persistence, live Builder, DB, deploy, task create, execute, approve, or push becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-058 added a local Approval Readiness Candidate mock but did not yet wire it into the shared Bluepilot Review Suite.
